description: Set automatic zoning of the sketch set.

keywords.name: direction
keywords.description: Control which part(s) of the extrusion are auto-zoned. If not specified, the last value specified is retained (the default is 'both'). In FLAC2D automatic zoning is restricted to the construction setting; this keyword is not used. Must be followed by a 'both', 'construction', or 'extrusion' sub-keyword.

keywords.name: direction-both
keywords.description: Auto-zoning is applied to both the 2D construction data and the 1D extrude segment data. This is the default.

keywords.name: direction-construction
keywords.description: Auto-zoning is applied to the 2D construction data only.

keywords.name: direction-extrusion
keywords.description: Auto-zoning is applied to the 1D extrude segment data only.

keywords.name: edge
keywords.description: Auto-zoning will attempt to keep the average length of a zone edge to the value f (between 1e-05 and 100000). If not supplied, the previous value will be used. The default value is 1.0.

keywords.name: size
keywords.description: Auto-zoning will assign zone sizes so that there are approximately i zones across the largest model dimension (i >= 1). If not supplied, the previous value will be used. The default value is 100.

keywords.name: total
keywords.description: Auto-zoning will assign zone sizes so that the total number of zones created is approximately (but not more than) i (i >= 1).
